data.title: Trump hints at China approving TikTok deal after call with Xi Jinping. Details remain undisclosed.
data.description: After a recent conversation with China's President Xi Jinping, the commander-in-chief expressed gratitude on Truth Social for the TikTok approval. This interaction comes as a significant development in diplomatic relations between the two countries.

data.title: Coinbase and OKX eyeing Australia's $2.8 trillion pension market, promoting crypto in self-managed super funds.
data.description: Two major global exchanges, Coinbase and OKX, are heavily investing in Australia's pension market, by promoting the inclusion of cryptocurrency in self-managed super funds. This move underscores the growing interest in digital assets within the country's retirement sector. Coinbase and OKX's efforts are aimed at tapping into Australia's significant pension reserves. These initiatives are anticipated to further boost the adoption of cryptocurrencies among investors looking to diversify their retirement portfolios.

data.title: Crypto drops, stocks reach new highs; SOL DeFi surges. AVAX & NEAR lead, XRP & DOGE ETF debut with $50m volume. Michigan BTC bill progresses, Brera Holdings launches $300m SOL DAT. ETH Fusaka upgrade in December. Plasma TGE on 25 Sept. PYUSD expands to Tron, Aave. Avantis adds tech stocks on-chain, enables 25x leverage. ASTER hits $3.8b FDV, $310m volume. BTC firm CEO pleads guilty in $200m ponzi, Canada seizes $40m from TradeOgre.
data.description: AVAX and NEAR are leading Layer 1 blockchain projects, while most alternative cryptocurrencies are experiencing a decline. XRP and DOGE have debuted ETFs, generating a combined $50 million in trading volume on the first day. MetaMask is set to release its token in the near future. A BTC bill in Michigan has progressed after a delay. Brera Holdings has introduced the SOL DAT fund with a total value of $300 million. Ethereum's Fusaka upgrade is scheduled for December. Plasma's TGE is scheduled for September 25th. Circle is facing significant competition from JP Morgan. PYUSD is expanding to Tron, Aave, and other blockchain platforms. Avantis has added top technology stocks to its platform and allows 25x leverage trading. ASTER's market cap has reached $3.8 billion, with a $310 million spot volume on the TGE launch. The CEO of a BTC trading firm has pleaded guilty to running a $200 million ponzi scheme. Canada has seized $40 million in cryptocurrency from TradeOgre.

Porsche faces notable extra costs, including tariffs, and plans to propose a 2025 dividend much higher than its current policy. The company also announced a delay in launching some all-electric vehicle models.

data.title: Inventor creates YAHNIQUE BRUSH (LJD-500) for better toilet cleaning; offers safe & sanitary solution below $50.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on September 19, 2025, an inventor from Ridge, N.Y. shared the inspiration behind creating the YAHNIQUE BRUSH. This innovative accessory aims to simplify cleaning underneath the toilet rim. The inventor highlighted that the design provides a safe, convenient, and sanitary option for this task. The brush is intended to offer a practical solution, making toilet cleaning more efficient.

data.title: Morse Micro's MM8108 Wi-Fi HaLow SoC wins 2025 EDGE Awards for IoT 2.0, enhancing connectivity for the next era.
data.description: In a press release dated September 19, 2025, Morse Micro, a prominent company specializing in Wi-Fi HaLow silicon solutions, unveiled its MM8108 Wi-Fi HaLow System-on-Chip (SoC) as the victor in the 2025 EDGE competition. This initiative signifies the onset of IoT 2.0, focusing on enhancing connectivity on a larger scale. With offices in Sydney and Irvine, Morse Micro stands out as a key player in advancing wireless technologies.
